customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: Customer ID returned by Apex in the format cust_NNN (e.g. cust_100). Empty string means the customer was NOT verified. Never invent a value — use only what Apex returns.

verified.title: Verified
verified.description: The literal lowercase string 'true' or 'false' returned by Apex. Only the exact string 'true' indicates a successful verification.
